title: Blanch Herbal Korean Stir-fry
description: A dense and flavorful post-workout dish featuring blanched green vegetables and a blend of herbal flavors with smoky paprika for high-protein enjoyment.
instructions: Preheat oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add onions and cook until translucent, about 2 minutes.
Stir in bell peppers and broccoli florets. Cook for another 5 minutes.
Add green beans to the pan with their cooking liquid. Cover and simmer for about 10 minutes.
Remove from heat and let it rest for a few minutes before serving.
Serve hot as a side dish or over a bed of brown rice.
